headline: Cintas Targets UniFirst Buyout for $5.5B, Sees $375M Synergies and 2H 2026 Close
summary: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) executives outlined plans to acquire UniFirst in a cash-and-stock transaction valued at approximately $5.5 billion, emphasizing expected cost synergies, a targeted closing timeline in the second half of calendar 2026, and confidence in the regulatory and integration processes.
